reference_source.scenario_file: SESepsis condition exists (severity 0..1) but no published end-to-end sepsis-with-vasopressor validation scenario; Norepinephrine PK validated separately in Drugs Methodology Table 9
reference_source.notes: Pulse v4.3.1 documentation does NOT publish a quantitative validation trajectory for sepsis or sepsis+vasopressor. Sources checked: cardiovascular_methodology (no sepsis in Table 3), nervous_methodology (no sepsis), endocrine_methodology (acute stress only), system_methodology (combined effects scenarios are airway/anesthesia/trauma — no sepsis), blood_chemistry_methodology (no sepsis), drugs_methodology (norepinephrine PK only, healthy patient). The SESepsis class exists (https://pulse.kitware.com/_s_e_sepsis_8h_source.html) with a 0..1 severity property, but no validation report. External published evaluation exists (MIMIC-III digital-twin assessment, SIAM 2024 article) but was a critique of Pulse rather than a Pulse-published reference curve. Checkpoints intentionally empty — validator handles this gracefully (status=skipped). To populate, would need either (a) a manual Pulse run of a sepsis+norepi scenario exporting CSV, or (b) MIMIC sepsis cohort medians from a credentialed PhysioNet pull.
